Headline: Closure - Exeter Cathedral School (Independent), Exeter, Devon
Info: The 850-year-old Exeter Cathedral School's prep section announced its closure due to 'unavoidable financial pressures' and the anticipated Labour VAT hike on private school fees.

Headline: Closure - Royal High Bath Prep School (Independent), Bath, Somerset
Info: Mary Berry's alma mater, Royal High Bath Prep School, announced its closure after 150 years, directly attributing the decision to the potential Labour VAT hike on private school fees.

Headline: Closure - Prestwich Preparatory School (Independent), Prestwich, Manchester
Info: Prestwich Preparatory School is closing, giving parents paying £8,000 a year in fees only three weeks' notice, causing significant disruption.

Headline: Closure - Rendcomb College (Independent), Gloucestershire
Info: Rendcomb College, a Gloucestershire independent school, announced its permanent closure after 106 years of operation, citing ongoing financial challenges.

Headline: Merger Cancelled - St Lawrence College (Independent), Ramsgate, Kent
Info: St Lawrence College in Ramsgate has halted its planned merger with Dover College with immediate effect, reversing a previous announcement to combine on a single site.
